race.comment: Tough. BRAZEN CRIME (10) had no luck from a wide barrier at Rosehill and then missed a whisker this track/trip in a 65. Draws inside again and tumbles in weight. That brings him right into it. MISS STALWART (8) won that contest off a string of placings. She is going extra well and for the in-form Olive yard also has weight relief. REMADOSI (9) resumes improved winning twice before stretching out to 1800m at Randwick, where she battled on fairly. Comes back home and has a chance with average luck in the run. TAYTAY BAY (11) is third-up and last time went well enough here behind MISS STALWART to consider.
